title: Compact UI follow-ons for title copy and journal notes
summary: Eighth structured packet for Eco Explorer. The title-copy-budget fix from `main-20` is the right pattern to preserve, not reopen. The next compact-UI implementation should focus on `main-22`: refit the journal detail pane so selected entries keep their own teaching text while ecosystem notes appear as a smaller companion card with authored note identity and a short observation cue.

execution_order.goal: Compare compact UI options for the title copy budget and the journal note-panel refit, then recommend one small direction.
execution_order.why_now: The title pattern is now stable and the note-panel follow-up is narrow enough that a concrete handoff will be faster than another exploratory implementation loop.

execution_order.goal: Refit the journal detail pane with a same-pane companion note card while preserving the authored title-copy-budget pattern already landed on the title screen.
execution_order.why_now: The note system is conceptually sound, but the current presentation still clips and replaces too much entry-specific teaching.

guardrails: Treat the title-copy-budget pattern in `src/engine/title-copy.ts` as settled precedent. Do not reopen title geometry unless a different product need forces it.
Do not reintroduce dynamic runtime truncation for core onboarding concepts like the field journal loop.
In the journal, keep `selectedEntry.journalText` visible when a note exists.
Prefer a smaller same-pane companion note card over a new toggle, tab, or overlay mode.
Use authored note identity where possible: title first, then a short observation cue; do not rely only on generic labels.
If space is too tight for all note fields, prioritize title plus prompt over repeating the full summary.
Locked note copy must stay spoiler-safe and be shorter than the current generic unlock sentence.
acceptance_focus: The title screen keeps the field-journal promise visible without reopening layout drift.
Selected entries with notes still show their own species/place learning in the journal.
The note surface exposes authored identity beyond a raw summary, preferably title plus a short observation cue.
Current beach, forest, and tundra note states fit cleanly inside the live 192x144 journal without clipped note or lock text.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-readability-pass-review.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-ecosystem-note-review.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-compact-ui-handoff.md, and this packet. Preserve the landed title-copy-budget pattern from main-20, then refit the journal detail pane in main-22 with a same-pane companion note card that keeps entry teaching visible.
